name: Vivgrid

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: Vivgrid states that it automatically routes API requests to the nearest available compute region and that geo-distributed models are accelerated in regions including EMEA, while its Terms say customer data may be processed and transferred within and to the United States, Canada, the European Economic Area, Australia, and Asia. The docs do not provide a customer-controlled EU-only processing guarantee.

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: Pricing states API access logs are retained for 1 day on the Free plan and 90 days on the Growth plan.
dataUsage.details: The public privacy policy says Vivgrid may use collected information to operate, maintain, improve the service, and develop new features and services, but no primary-source statement was found that specifically addresses model training on API customer data.

notes: Vivgrid publicly provides a privacy policy and terms, but no primary-source DPA/AVV, sub-processor list, SCC statement, or explicit training-on-customer-data statement was found. Its docs and terms indicate globally distributed routing and cross-region processing/transfers, so EU-only inference cannot be treated as guaranteed from public documentation.
